MM_2014_CAN_M_v3.8_MESSAGE_LIST_05_12_2014

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 00
Recv ID: 00
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: FF
Func Name: CAN2

Requests

    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "040F",
